site.fullName: Cherubim and Seraphim Movement Church, Center for Deliverance through Evangelism
site.tagline: Built for faith, family and impact.

hero.badge: One Altar · One Church · One Mission
hero.title: Rooted in Christ.
hero.description: Welcome to Cherubim and Seraphim Movement Church, Center for Deliverance through Evangelism. We are The Peculiar Cherubs. We are a growing family committed to worship, prayer, discipleship, evangelism, and transformed lives through Jesus Christ.

slides.alt: Senior Pastor ministering during a church service

identity.title: A church family for every people and generation.
identity.description: We exist to help people know Christ, grow in truth, discover purpose, and live as His disciples in everyday life.

cards.title: Encounter God
cards.text: Worship, prayer, and the Word create room for genuine encounters with Jesus.

cards.title: Grow Together
cards.text: We build strong communities where people are known, nurtured, and equipped.

cards.title: Live on Mission
cards.text: Every believer is empowered to serve, lead, and bring hope to the world.

pastor.title: Leading with faith, wisdom, and a heart for people.
pastor.text: Our Senior Pastor provides spiritual leadership to Peculiar Cherubs and its PDCM chapels, faithfully teaching the Word, nurturing believers, and advancing the vision of deliverance through evangelism.
pastor.name: Pastor Alex Ogundipe

testimonials.title: Stories of grace and transformed lives.
testimonials.description: Real stories from people who have encountered God through the ministry and community of Peculiar Cherubs.

items.quote: Through the prayers, teaching, and love I received here, my faith became stronger and my family experienced a new beginning.
items.name: Member Name

items.quote: I came seeking direction and found a spiritual family. The Word helped me understand my purpose and walk confidently with God.
items.name: Member Name

items.quote: The youth chapel gave me a place to worship freely, serve with my gifts, and grow alongside other young believers.
items.name: Member Name

hero.title:
Forming disciples.
Transforming lives.
hero.description: Peculiar Cherubs is a Christ-centred church family devoted to raising believers who know God, live His Word, and reflect His love.

story.title: A people called to be peculiar.
paragraphs: We believe the church is more than a building. It is a living family of people called out of darkness into the marvellous light of Christ.
Across every PDCM chapel, our focus remains the same: authentic worship, sound teaching, intentional discipleship, compassionate service, and kingdom impact.
story.quote: You are a chosen generation, a royal priesthood, a holy nation, a peculiar people.

values.title: Christ Above All
values.text: Jesus is the centre of our message, worship, mission, and identity.

values.title: Word and Spirit
values.text: We are grounded in Scripture and dependent on the Holy Spirit.

values.title: People Matter
values.text: Every person is seen, valued, loved, and invited into community.

values.title: Purposeful Service
values.text: We use our gifts to strengthen the church and bless the world.

hero.title:
One Altar.
One Church.
hero.description: Each PDCM chapel carries the vision of Peculiar Cherubs while serving the spiritual and practical needs of its immediate community.

current.name: PDCM Gwarimpa Chapel
current.subtitle: A local worship and discipleship community under Peculiar Cherubs.

current.name: PDCM Byazhin Chapel
current.subtitle: Serving believers and families through worship, prayer, and evangelism.

current.name: PDCM Mega Youth Chapel
current.subtitle: A youth-centred chapel raising disciples, worshippers, and kingdom leaders.

upcoming.name: PDCM Gwagwalada
upcoming.text: Coming soon as a new expression of Peculiar Cherubs.

upcoming.name: PDCM Bwari
upcoming.text: Coming soon to extend worship, discipleship, and evangelism.

hero.title:
Truth for life.
Faith for the journey.
hero.description: Watch, listen, and grow through messages from across the Peculiar Cherubs family.

hero.title:
Read. Reflect.
Grow.
hero.description: Explore Daily Morning Devotion, Goodnews This Week, Sunday School Outline, church news, teaching resources, and ministry updates from Peculiar Cherubs.

dailyDevotion.title: Start the day in God’s presence.
dailyDevotion.text: A daily scripture, reflection, and prayer to help you begin each morning rooted in God’s Word.

latestGoodnews.heading: Stay informed and encouraged.
latestGoodnews.supportingText: Upload each weekly edition as a PDF or link it to an online reader.

latestGoodnews.title: Church news, devotion, and updates.
latestGoodnews.text: Read the latest issue and browse previous editions from the publication archive.

archive.text: Devotional insight, announcements, and ministry updates.

archive.title: Growing Through Prayer
archive.text: Encouragement, testimonies, and updates from the chapels.

archive.title: Prepared for Impact
archive.text: Highlights from worship, teaching, and church programmes.

sundaySchool.title: This Week’s Lesson
sundaySchool.text: Study notes, lesson objectives, discussion questions, and scriptures for Sunday School.

hero.title:
Connect. Worship.
Stay informed.
hero.description: Access church information, weekly publications, services, events, prayer, and ways to connect with Peculiar Cherubs.

links.text: Share your prayer needs with us.

links.text: Serve with your gifts and skills.

events.title: Sunday Service
events.text: Our regular Sunday worship gathering across the chapels.

events.title: Shiloh Service
events.text: A midweek service of prayer, worship, the Word, and spiritual renewal.

events.title: Peculiar Cherubs Conference
events.text: A major gathering for worship, teaching, fellowship, and renewal.

events.title: Founder’s Day
events.text: A celebration of the church’s heritage, vision, and founding legacy.

events.title: Choir Fiesta
events.text: A music and worship celebration featuring the church choir and invited ministers.

events.title: Harvest
events.text: A thanksgiving celebration of God’s faithfulness and provision.

hero.title:
Generosity that
advances the mission.
hero.description: Your giving supports worship, evangelism, discipleship, publications, outreach, church programmes, and the continued growth of PDCM chapels.

why.title: Giving is worship.
why.description: We give in gratitude to God and in partnership with the work He is doing through Peculiar Cherubs. Every gift helps the ministry serve people, share the gospel, and strengthen communities.

hero.title:
Grounded in truth.
Equipped for ministry.
hero.description: Christian Heritage Bible School exists to help believers understand Scripture, grow in spiritual maturity, and become equipped for effective Christian service and leadership.

introduction.title: Biblical education for purposeful Christian living.
introduction.description: Whether you are preparing for ministry, strengthening your biblical foundation, or seeking deeper spiritual growth, Christian Heritage Bible School provides structured teaching, practical resources, and a supportive learning community.

pathways.title: Register
pathways.text: Begin your application, review admission requirements, and submit your registration details.

pathways.title: Take Classes
pathways.text: Access current lessons, course materials, assignments, and class schedules.

pathways.title: Catch Up
pathways.text: Watch missed classes, download notes, and continue from where you stopped.

courses.title: Foundations of Christian Faith
courses.text: An introduction to essential Christian doctrines, salvation, spiritual growth, and faithful discipleship.

courses.title: Biblical Interpretation
courses.text: Learn responsible principles for studying, understanding, and applying Scripture.

courses.title: Christian Leadership and Ministry
courses.text: Develop biblical leadership character, ministry skills, and a heart for serving people.

courses.title: Evangelism and Missions
courses.text: Explore the biblical mandate for evangelism and practical approaches to sharing the gospel.

courses.title: Prayer and Spiritual Formation
courses.text: Build a disciplined prayer life and cultivate habits that deepen your walk with God.

courses.title: Church History and Heritage
courses.text: Study major movements, people, and events that have shaped the Christian faith.

studentServices.title: Student Dashboard
studentServices.text: See enrolled courses, class progress, announcements, and upcoming deadlines.

studentServices.title: Assignments and Assessments
studentServices.text: Submit coursework, complete assessments, and review lecturer feedback.

studentServices.title: Class Schedule
studentServices.text: View lecture dates, live-class links, academic calendar, and important notices.

studentServices.title: Learning Resources
studentServices.text: Download lecture notes, reading lists, outlines, recordings, and study guides.

studentServices.title: Academic Support
studentServices.text: Contact school administrators or lecturers when you need help with your studies.

studentServices.title: Certificates and Records
studentServices.text: Request academic records and access completion or graduation information.

registration.title: Begin your Bible-school journey.
registration.description: Complete the registration process to join the next Christian Heritage Bible School session. Official dates, fees, entry requirements, and payment information can be added here.

portal.title: Continue your learning.
portal.description: Returning students can access classes, catch-up recordings, assignments, learning materials, announcements, and academic support.
